evals.prompt: 帮我总结这个 B 站视频：https://www.bilibili.com/video/BVEXAMPLE
evals.expected_output: The agent submits the video with Pro quality, polls the job, and returns EasySourceFlow's final Markdown without rewriting it.
expectations: Uses easysourceflow_submit_link rather than independently downloading or transcribing the video
Uses summary_quality pro
Polls easysourceflow_get_job until a terminal state
Returns the final summary Markdown unchanged

evals.prompt: https://example.com/article 帮我整理一下这篇文章
evals.expected_output: The agent submits the webpage as a durable job, waits for it with the same job ID, and directly delivers the final Markdown.
expectations: Uses easysourceflow_submit_link and retains the returned job ID
Uses easysourceflow_get_job with wait_seconds 45 until a terminal state
Does not perform a second summary
Preserves links, labels, and output path from the result

evals.expected_output: After a prior EasySourceFlow result, the agent favorites that result and confirms without resending it.
expectations: Uses easysourceflow_favorite_result with the latest known result identifier
Confirms the favorite operation concisely
Does not resend or rewrite the summary

evals.prompt: 把刚完成的 EasySourceFlow 总结用飞书 Markdown 卡片发给我；卡片参数如果报错也不要缩写。
evals.expected_output: The agent passes the Feishu card as an object and preserves EasySourceFlow's complete final Markdown even if card delivery needs a fallback.
expectations: Passes the card argument as an object rather than a JSON string
Uses the exact result.summary_markdown as the card Markdown content
Corrects a card type validation error before retrying
Falls back to the complete unchanged Markdown rather than a shorter summary

evals.prompt:
[media attached: report.pdf (application/pdf)]
<file name="report.pdf">This report explains a three-stage product strategy, its risks, and the recommended next actions.</file>
evals.expected_output: The bare PDF attachment is treated as an implicit summary request, submitted to EasySourceFlow as document content, polled to completion, and delivered unchanged.
expectations: Triggers EasySourceFlow even though the user did not explicitly ask for a summary
Uses easysourceflow_submit_document_file with the attachment path even though preview text is present
Does not treat message-injected PDF preview text as the complete document
Does not use a PDF model or summarize the attachment directly
Polls easysourceflow_get_job until a terminal state
Returns the final result.summary_markdown unchanged

evals.expected_output: The bare article URL is treated as an implicit EasySourceFlow summary request and follows the durable link workflow.
expectations: Triggers EasySourceFlow without requiring the word summarize
Uses easysourceflow_submit_link and retains the job ID
Polls easysourceflow_get_job until completion
Does not use an unrelated fetcher or the Agent's own summary

evals.prompt:
[media attached: report.pdf (application/pdf)]
<file name="report.pdf">This is the same truncated preview shown in the previous turn.</file>
evals.expected_output: A repeated PDF remains an EasySourceFlow request and is submitted as the original file rather than answered with a duplicate-content message.
expectations: Uses easysourceflow_submit_document_file again with force_refresh false
Allows EasySourceFlow cache handling to decide whether work is reused
Does not reply that the document is identical or ask the user to upload it again
Polls the returned job ID and delivers the final Markdown unchanged
